findings.title: Authentication enforced on all API endpoints
findings.remediation: Enable auth.enabled in config.yaml and enforce JWT/API-key on every endpoint.

findings.title: Audit log is append-only (no UPDATE/DELETE on events)
findings.remediation: Ensure audit_logger.py never issues UPDATE or DELETE against the audit_log table.

findings.title: Every agent action records trace_id + user identity
findings.remediation: Ensure audit_logger stores trace_id and actor fields for every event.

findings.title: PII/PHI filter active in LLM gateway
findings.remediation: Import and invoke pii_filter.scrub() before every LLM generate() call.

findings.title: PHI encrypted at rest (SQLite WAL + key-at-rest config)
findings.detail: No PHI encryption-at-rest configuration found. Set encryption.at_rest: true in config.yaml or SAGE_ENCRYPT_AT_REST=true.
findings.remediation: Enable encryption.at_rest in config.yaml and use SQLCipher or filesystem encryption.

findings.title: PHI encrypted in transit (TLS 1.2+ enforced)
findings.detail: TLS/HTTPS configuration reference found in config.yaml
findings.remediation: Set tls.min_version: 'TLSv1.2' in config.yaml and terminate TLS at the API layer.

findings.title: Rate limiting configured on public API endpoints
findings.detail: No rate limiting detected in api.py. Add slowapi or equivalent to protect against DoS.
findings.remediation: Add slowapi / limits middleware to api.py; set rate limits in config.yaml.

findings.title: RBAC enforced — roles cannot exceed declared permissions
findings.detail: RBAC Role/Permission definitions found in rbac.py
findings.remediation: Ensure rbac.py Role enum and permission matrix is applied at every privileged endpoint.

findings.title: Audit log schema missing required fields
findings.remediation: Add missing fields to CREATE TABLE statement in audit_logger.py.

findings.title: Dependency scan error: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
findings.remediation: Investigate pip-audit installation and run manually.
